# iproute_token (Resource)

Manages IPv6 tokenized interface identifiers (ip token).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# IPv6 token on a veth interface
# Note: the interface must support IPv6 NDP (dummy interfaces do not)
resource "iproute_token" "example" {
  device = "veth0"
  token  = "::1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `device` (String) Interface name.
- `token` (String) IPv6 interface token.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
